description: Remediation entries linking findings to fix prompts (Prompt 585A). Used by the remediation prompt generation workflow (585B) to generate fix prompts from the ledger. See docs/operations/industry-audit-remediation-ledger.md, docs/operations/industry-remediation-prompt-generation-workflow.md, and docs/schemas/industry-remediation-entry-schema.md.

remediation_entries.title: Prompt 611 first remediation batch
remediation_entries.implementation_scope: None. No defect findings in ledger; all audit entries 586-610 are no-finding (verified).
remediation_entries.grouping_rationale: Batch 611 execution record only. No defect cluster selected.
remediation_entries.notes: Prompt 611 ran per workflow. Ledger contained only IND-AUD-NO-* entries with status verified. No open/triaged/blocked findings; therefore no remediation cluster selected and no code changes. See docs/operations/industry-remediation-batch-611.md.
